commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e87d2a84430f5a469042c6e5d9c4314044645f8f)
commands.review_summary:
The branch clears cached `modelProvider` and `model` fields when auto-reply `/new` or `/reset` creates a fresh session, adds persisted-store regression coverage, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +59, Docs +1. Total +65 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: seed a persisted channel session with `modelProvider` and `model`, trigger `/new` or `/reset`, and current main can preserve those old fields through the reset merge before model resolution uses them.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is existing-PR cleanup and conflict resolution, not a separate replacement fix lane.

target.title: fix(auto-reply): clear runtime model cache on reset
target.author: mjamiv

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
